zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys於大約1165年出生在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾利安迪費桑特時，她的父親Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales43歲，母親Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis35歲。她於大約1180年與Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1236年在英國威爾斯丹比爾伯頓享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys于大约1165年出生在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾利安迪費桑特时，她的父亲Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales43岁，母亲Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis35岁。她于大约1180年与Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1236年在英国威尔斯丹比爾伯頓享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: German: occupational name for a ferryman, Middle High German verje, verge.

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English laford, louerd, lord ‘lord, master’ (Old English hlāford), perhaps given to a someone who played the part of the lord or master of ceremonies in festival games.
Irish: adoption of the English name (see 1 above) as a translation of the main element of Gaelic Ó Tighearnaigh (see Tierney ) and Mac Thighearnáin (see McKiernan ).
Americanized form of French Laure, a variant of the personal name Laur 3.

variants.name: Tierney
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, John Patrick, Brigid, Clodagh, Kieran, Michael Sean, Siobhan.

Irish: shortened form of O'Tierney, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tíghearnaigh ‘descendant of Tighearnach’, a byname meaning ‘lord, master’. The Gaelic name is sometimes ‘translated’ as English Lord . Compare Tiernan .

variants.name: Lords
meanings: English: variant of Lord , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Rhys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Rees
meanings: German: habitational name from a place in the Rhineland called Rees.
German: from a short form of the personal name   Andreas  .

nameMeanings.name: Gwenllian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys was born about 1165, in Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales, was 43 and her mother, Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis, was 35. She married Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules about 1180. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1236, in Burton, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys est née environ 1165, à Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules environ 1180. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1236, à Burton, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys um 1165 in Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales 43 und ihre Mutter Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis 35. Sie hat um 1180 Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1236 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Burton, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys è nata il circa 1165 nel Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules circa 1180. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1236, nel Burton, Denbighshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhysが約1165年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランディフエイサントで生まれた時，父Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Walesは43歳，母Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powisは35歳であった。約1180年にEdnyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dulesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1236年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアブルトンで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys(이)가 대략 1165년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 랜디프이산트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 대략 1180년 Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1236년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르 버턴에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys nasceu aproximadamente 1165, em Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules aproximadamente 1180. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1236, em Burton, Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys родилась около 1165 г. в местности лландифисант, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules около 1180 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1236 г. в местности буртон, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys nació aproximadamente 1165, en Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules aproximadamente 1180. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1236, en Burton, Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años.
